calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-28-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Carlito Mandia.
Petitioner: Daria Woo, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Santino Soong On Woo, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Santino Jordan Soong On Woo.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-05-2004 Reset To Oct-28-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Yvonne Lee.
Petitioner: Daria Woo, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor, was swron and examined.
Petitioner was unable to provide proof of publication at the hearing.
No objections to the proposed change of name of a minor were made at the hearing.
This matter is continued to Oct. 28, 2004 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218 for proof of publication.
